name: oracledb
description: Connect, query, and interact with Oracle Databases and their data within Gemini CLI.

settings.name: Connection String
settings.description: The connection string for your Oracle database

settings.name: Use OCI
settings.description: (Optional) Boolean indicating whether this Oracle instance is hosted in a cloud environment

settings.name: Wallet Location
settings.description: (Optional) Oracle wallet location for cloud deployments
